description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front features a gated entry with a small garden area, including a palm-like plant and a paved path leading to the main door. The upper floor has a balcony with a metal railing, and the windows are rectangular and arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some dark accents and a section of decorative stone or tile near the entrance. The side and rear views reveal additional windows, a secondary outdoor area, and a partially enclosed patio space. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and privacy.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, gated entry, balcony, and minimalist white exterior accented by dark and stone elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, small garden, main door, and balcony above.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window openings, and a palm plant in the corner.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the open patio, balcony, and more of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Side view with several narrow windows, a visible palm plant, and a glimpse of the entry area.
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a small garden, paved path, and a simple main door under a balcony with metal railing.
